title: Fix project table creation error in TUI/CLI
description: Ensure Project is imported in init_db and run init_db idempotently on every session to create missing tables.
close_reason: Ensured Project model is imported in init_db and run init_db unconditionally in get_session to create the project table even if the database already exists.

title: Fix TUI generator get_session error and verify package building
description: Decorate get_session with @contextmanager, import correctly, and configure gitignore for dist/.

title: Fix TabbedContent usage in TUI
description: Change TabbedContent construction to use with statements for correct nesting in compose().

title: Fix TUI button variant error
description: Change variant='secondary' to variant='default' in tui.py to resolve Textual exception.

title: Implement project metadata and TUI segregation
description: 1. Filter activity feed in TUI by highlighted task. 2. Define project level metadata, comments, and stats, keeping memories project-level. 3. Segregate tasks and project pane in TUI.
close_reason: All features implemented: project metadata, CLI project group, TUI segregation of Task Board & Project Hub tabs, filtered feeds, and all unit tests pass.

title: Improve TUI project-level and task-level metadata display
description: Add project overview statistics, memories tab, and joint decisions panel to TUI.

title: Mock collaboration simulation and test report
description: Write simulation script, execute multi-agent collaborative workflows, and generate test report.

title: Write unit tests and verify
description: Create pytest suite for testing CLI and database behavior.

title: Implement TUI dashboard
description: Implement the Textual-based interactive TUI for visual task management.

title: Implement CLI commands
description: Implement the Typer-based CLI commands for task, dependency, comment, decision, memory, and feed management.

title: Implement database models and CRUD operations
description: Create SQLModel schema, SQLite db initialization, and database operations/event logging.

title: Initialize Python project structure
description: Set up the pyproject.toml, package structure, and install dependencies using uv.
